title: Golden Fixture
description: One row of the golden-state regression suite. Pins the expected post-replay state hash for a (scenarioId, seed, commandLog) triple. The runner under src/engine/__tests__/golden.test.ts replays each fixture and asserts the final state hash equals expectedStateHash. On drift the runner fails with a canonical-JSON diff. Blessing is gated behind scripts/golden-bless.mjs which refuses to run in CI.

scenarioId.description: Stable id of the scenario the fixture replays. Resolves through the scenario loader pinned by mvp.08-persistence.04-scenario-loader.

seed.description: PCG32 seed passed to replay(seed, log).

commandLog.description: Sequence of canonical commands replayed against scenarioId at seed. Empty arrays are valid (assert the initial-state hash for scenario + seed).

expectedStateHash.description: 16-hex-char xxh64 digest of the canonical-JSON serialization of GameState after replay completes.

notes.description: Optional one-line note on what the fixture exercises (e.g. "empty garrison auto-loss"). Excluded from hash inputs by convention.
